data.title: ticket link task->story child promoted to task->epic making story deps show 0 children
data.description: When linking implementation tasks to their parent story via '.claude/scripts/dso ticket link <task-id> <story-id> child', hierarchy enforcement promotes all links to task->epic level (REDIRECT: task->story promoted to task->epic). Consequently, 'ticket deps <story-id>' always shows 0 children even after multiple task creation and linking commands. Tasks are trackable only via name pattern search or by querying the epic deps. This makes story-level progress tracking impossible without workarounds. Observed during sprint execution of epic b885-e9e8 across all 6 stories and 14 tasks.
